_comment: Streetlight MCP server configuration for Claude Code. Pick the snippet that matches your OS, replace the absolute path, and remove this _comment key. Paths containing spaces work as-is in JSON strings; do NOT add extra quoting.
_notes: STREETLIGHT_QUEUE_DIR is optional. If omitted, the MCP server uses the platform default (macOS: ~/Library/Application Support/Streetlight/queue, Windows: %APPDATA%/Streetlight/queue, Linux: ~/.local/share/streetlight/queue).
Both the MCP server AND the Lua bridge must agree on the queue directory. If you set STREETLIGHT_QUEUE_DIR here, you must pass the same path to the bridge — see reaper/streetlight_bridge.lua.
Paths with spaces work in JSON as plain strings. Do NOT wrap them in extra quotes.
